# ST Engineering

> ST Engineering harnesses technology and innovation across Defence, Aerospace, Smart City, and Digital businesses to enable a more secure and sustainable world.

ST Engineering is a global technology, defence and engineering group with offices across Asia, Europe, the Middle East and the U.S. This portal hosts company news, product information, business updates and investor-relevant content.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of ST Engineering's businesses and latest highlights.
- [News](/news): Latest news, announcements, and press releases.
- [Products](/products): Products and solutions across Aerospace, Smart City, Defence and Digital.
- [Charity](/charity): Community engagement, charity programs and sustainability initiatives.
- [About](/about): Company background, leadership and corporate information.
- [Support](/support): Customer support and AI assistant for ST Engineering products and services.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in for registered users.
- [Register](/register): Create a new account.
